name: omcc-slim
description: Marketplace for oh-my-claude-code-slim — an OMO-slim orchestration port for Claude Code.

plugins.name: oh-my-claude-code-slim
plugins.description: OMO-slim orchestration port for Claude Code: an orchestrator agent launched via `claude --agent`, five specialist subagents (explorer, librarian, oracle, designer, fixer), orchestrator-gated reminder hooks, and ported OMO skills.
